summary: M404 — Major batch follow-up: status tooltips on party frames + compact +N points badge + async sim + .pps-char-badge live update + manual-combat default fixed; Manual Characters advanced option (replaces Hard-difficulty auto-lock); one-liner advanced descriptions; New Combat UI (BETA) default ON; Auto checkbox in char creation + custom hire; starting gold 50 + Silas gold gift 100; random-name dice icon in char creation; Load-game Advanced (N) collapsible; cleric_priestess flagged NPC; quest reward audit (Collapsed Passage + others) + Silas amulet/ring fix (was passing 'amulet' which isn't a valid item base); hybrid skill resolver always treats STR scaling as heavy (was falling to light); Holy Strike + 3 hybrid skill descriptions reworded; Combat Debug Show Grid Placement now lights ALL 7×6 cells; emit-game-data emits damageStat/damageMult/damageCategory; tavern roster genuinely depletes (no reshuffle); auto-toggle button parity between Inventory and Attributes.
